title: Die Norm
original_title: Die Norm - Ist dabei sein wirklich alles?
overview: Every athlete must achieve a performance level set by national and international sports associations in order to participate in the Olympic Games: the Olympic standard. The documentary film follows five top athletes from very different sports for 20 months as they prepare for the Olympic Games in Rio de Janeiro – will they achieve their dream?
